title: centaurea langei subsp. kheilii
intro: Centaurea langei subsp. kheilii, also known as Kheil's cornflower, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centaurea langei subsp. kheilii are attributed to its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
